ground_truth.directive: Always use `uv run` to run Python files, modules, tests, and repo scripts; do not invoke the global `python` or `python3` command directly.
ground_truth.expected_action: It is acceptable to invoke python only as the interpreter managed by uv run.

trace_records_snapshot.directive: Always use `uv run` to run Python files, modules, tests, and repo scripts; do not invoke the global `python` or `python3` command directly.
trace_records_snapshot.expected_action: It is acceptable to invoke python only as the interpreter managed by uv run.

trace_records_snapshot.content: Run the focused trace test through uv-managed Python.

content.text: I will run the repository Python entrypoint through uv, not as a bare python process.

input.command: uv run python -m pytest tests/core/test_trace.py -q || true
